# CHANGELOG 6.X

## 6.1.0

### Features

- [c60c828](https://github.com/dubzzz/pure-rand/commit/c60c828) вњЁ Clone from state on `xorshift128plus` (#697)
- [6a16bfe](https://github.com/dubzzz/pure-rand/commit/6a16bfe) вњЁ Clone from state on `mersenne` (#698)
- [fb78e2d](https://github.com/dubzzz/pure-rand/commit/fb78e2d) вњЁ Clone from state on `xoroshiro128plus` (#699)
- [a7dd56c](https://github.com/dubzzz/pure-rand/commit/a7dd56c) вњЁ Clone from state on congruential32 (#696)
- [1f6c3a5](https://github.com/dubzzz/pure-rand/commit/1f6c3a5) рџЏ·пёЏ Expose internal state of generators (#694)

### Fixes

- [30d439a](https://github.com/dubzzz/pure-rand/commit/30d439a) рџ’љ Fix broken lock file (#695)
- [9f935ae](https://github.com/dubzzz/pure-rand/commit/9f935ae) рџ‘· Speed-up CI with better cache (#677)

## 6.0.0

### Breaking Changes

- [c45912f](https://github.com/dubzzz/pure-rand/commit/c45912f) рџ’Ґ Require generators uniform in int32 (#513)
- [0bde03e](https://github.com/dubzzz/pure-rand/commit/0bde03e) рџ’Ґ Drop congruencial generator (#511)

### Features

- [7587984](https://github.com/dubzzz/pure-rand/commit/7587984) вљЎпёЏ Faster uniform distribution on bigint (#517)
- [464960a](https://github.com/dubzzz/pure-rand/commit/464960a) вљЎпёЏ Faster uniform distribution on small ranges (#516)
- [b4852a8](https://github.com/dubzzz/pure-rand/commit/b4852a8) вљЎпёЏ Faster Congruencial 32bits (#512)
- [fdb6ec8](https://github.com/dubzzz/pure-rand/commit/fdb6ec8) вљЎпёЏ Faster Mersenne-Twister (#510)
- [bb69be5](https://github.com/dubzzz/pure-rand/commit/bb69be5) вљЎпёЏ Drop infinite loop for explicit loop (#507)
